exportDesc: Download a backup of all your organizations and modules.
importDesc: Restore your data from a JSON backup file.
noOrganizationsMsg: No organizations yet. Create one to get started!
deleteOrgConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this organization and all its modules? This action cannot be undone.
noModulesMsg: No modules added yet. Click the button below to add one.
selectModuleDesc: Select a module type and enter values.
deleteModuleConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this module? This action cannot be undone.
aboutDescription: An open-source web application that helps organizations calculate and track their carbon dioxide (CO₂) emissions. The app allows you to manually add consumptions in a modular way and get a calculated CO₂ emissions footprint.
aboutDescriptionExtra: This project is designed to be simple, modular, and easy to maintain while providing visual insights into your organization's environmental impact.
featureCalculate: Calculate CO₂ emissions based on country factors
featureLanguages: Multi-language support (English, German, Italian, Spanish, Swedish)
contributorsDesc: This project was developed as part of the Erasmus+ program.
contributorsAck: We acknowledge the contribution of all developers, designers, and stakeholders who made this project possible.
